entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH, INDIA
entities.description: Semi-arid region in India where the study was conducted

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: Widespread degradation of land in the study area

entities.name: LOW SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: Low levels of soil organic carbon affecting 78% of fields

entities.name: NUTRIENT DEFICIENCY
entities.description: Deficiencies of available nutrients including phosphorus, sulfur, calcium, zinc, boron, and copper

entities.name: SOIL TEST-BASED NUTRIENT ADDITION
entities.description: Addition of deficient micro- and macronutrients based on soil tests

entities.name: FOOD GRAIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The output of food grains from the production system

entities.name: STRAW PRODUCTION
entities.description: The output of straw used as fodder

entities.name: CEMENT-LINED FARM-PONDS
entities.description: Low-cost micro-watershed scale ponds for water storage at the smallholder farm level

entities.name: DROUGHT-PROOFING
entities.description: The process of making crops resistant to drought

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of crop harvested per unit area

entities.name: PRODUCTION SYSTEM DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The act of diversifying the production system

entities.name: SHARED MACHINERY RESOURCES
entities.description: Collective use of machinery for farm sowing operations

entities.name: OPERATIONAL AND ECONOMIC EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency of farm sowing operations

entities.name: DRYLAND SMALL HOLDINGS
entities.description: Small-scale farms located in dryland regions

entities.name: POLICY SUPPORT
entities.description: Institutional support to scale low-cost interventions

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall output efficiency of the production system

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the necessities of life for farmers
